'''âr-y-f''' ('''karayaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calesce|calesce]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-y-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calesce|calesce]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-y-f
|-
! Lemma
| karayaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirayaf|thirayaf]] || [[word:jirayaf|jirayaf]] || [[word:shirayaf|shirayaf]] || [[word:kirayaf|kirayaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurayaf|thuthurayaf]] || [[word:jujurayaf|jujurayaf]] || [[word:shushurayaf|shushurayaf]] || [[word:kukurayaf|kukurayaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurayaf|thurayaf]] || [[word:jurayaf|jurayaf]] || [[word:shurayaf|shurayaf]] || [[word:kurayaf|kurayaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurayaf|thurayaf]] || [[word:jurayaf|jurayaf]] || [[word:shurayaf|shurayaf]] || [[word:kurayaf|kurayaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therayaf|therayaf]] || [[word:jerayaf|jerayaf]] || [[word:sherayaf|sherayaf]] || [[word:kerayaf|kerayaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorayaf|thothorayaf]] || [[word:jojorayaf|jojorayaf]] || [[word:shoshorayaf|shoshorayaf]] || [[word:kokorayaf|kokorayaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorayaf|thorayaf]] || [[word:jorayaf|jorayaf]] || [[word:shorayaf|shorayaf]] || [[word:korayaf|korayaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorayaf|thorayaf]] || [[word:jorayaf|jorayaf]] || [[word:shorayaf|shorayaf]] || [[word:korayaf|korayaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrayaf|thĂŠrayaf]] || [[word:jĂŠrayaf|jĂŠrayaf]] || [[word:shĂŠrayaf|shĂŠrayaf]] || [[word:kĂŠrayaf|kĂŠrayaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharayaf|thatharayaf]] || [[word:jajarayaf|jajarayaf]] || [[word:shasharayaf|shasharayaf]] || [[word:kakarayaf|kakarayaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharayaf|tharayaf]] || [[word:jarayaf|jarayaf]] || [[word:sharayaf|sharayaf]] || [[word:karayaf|karayaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharayaf|tharayaf]] || [[word:jarayaf|jarayaf]] || [[word:sharayaf|sharayaf]] || [[word:karayaf|karayaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharayaf|sharayaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharayaf|gosharayaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharayaf|gokisharayaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharayafnĂŒ|sharayafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharayafnknĂŒ|gosharayafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharayafnĂŒ|gokisharayafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharayafshĂ«|sharayafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharayafnkshĂ«|gosharayafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharayafshĂ«|gokisharayafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharayafro|sharayafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharayafnkro|gosharayafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharayafro|gokisharayafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharayafmu|sharayafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharayafnkmu|gosharayafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharayafmu|gokisharayafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharayafsher|sharayafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharayafnksher|gosharayafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharayafsher|gokisharayafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharayafng|sharayafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharayafnkng|gosharayafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharayafng|gokisharayafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharayafya|sharayafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharayafnkya|gosharayafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharayafya|gokisharayafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharayafyam|sharayafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharayafnkyam|gosharayafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharayafyam|gokisharayafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharayafnĂŒshĂ«|sharayafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharayafnknĂŒshĂ«|gosharayafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharayafnĂŒshĂ«|gokisharayafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharayafnĂŒro|sharayafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharayafnknĂŒro|gosharayafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharayafnĂŒro|gokisharayafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharayafnĂŒmu|sharayafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharayafnknĂŒmu|gosharayafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharayafnĂŒmu|gokisharayafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharayafshĂ«nĂŒ|sharayafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharayafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharayafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharayafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharayafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharayafshĂ«ro|sharayafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharayafnkshĂ«ro|gosharayafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharayafshĂ«ro|gokisharayafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharayafshĂ«mu|sharayafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharayafnkshĂ«mu|gosharayafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharayafshĂ«mu|gokisharayafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharayafronĂŒ|sharayafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharayafnkronĂŒ|gosharayafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharayafronĂŒ|gokisharayafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharayafroshĂ«|sharayafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharayafnkroshĂ«|gosharayafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharayafroshĂ«|gokisharayafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharayafromu|sharayafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharayafnkromu|gosharayafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharayafromu|gokisharayafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharayafmunĂŒ|sharayafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharayafnkmunĂŒ|gosharayafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharayafmunĂŒ|gokisharayafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharayafmushĂ«|sharayafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharayafnkmushĂ«|gosharayafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharayafmushĂ«|gokisharayafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharayafmuro|sharayafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharayafnkmuro|gosharayafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharayafmuro|gokisharayafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
